title: Workspace Improvement Intake
goal: Implement #457 by making setup findings, dogfooding friction, review findings, validation friction, and memory improvement signals appear as one improvement-intake routing concept with explicit evidence subtypes and promotion rules.
non_goals: Do not remove the underlying artifacts in this slice.
Do not turn improvement intake into an automatic backlog.
Do not make advanced review machinery part of ordinary startup.

intent.outcome: Agents see one compact improvement-intake path first, while provenance, confidence, and destination decisions stay explicit.
intent.constraints: Keep the default product smaller; use existing defaults/report/config/docs surfaces instead of adding a new top-level command.
intent.latitude: Choose the lightest contract, report, docs, and tests needed to merge the concepts.
intent.escalation: Escalate if unifying the route would hide evidence trust or make speculative signals look like accepted work.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed slice, close #457, refresh external issue evidence, then promote the next #450 child indicated by refreshed planning state.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, contract tooling if contracts change, ruff, maintainer/planning surfaces, proof selector, workspace doctor

invariants: Improvement intake is a router, not a backlog.
Weak or speculative signals remain dismissible.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450: make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #458-#460 plus #467/#469/#471 remain after this slice unless validation proves they are satisfied or superseded.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #457 closeout, refresh external evidence and promote the next #450 child indicated by validation

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Setup findings, dogfooding friction, review findings, validation friction, and Memory improvement-signal notes now share one compact improvement-intake router in defaults/report output.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: #470 already tracks summary noise when archived partial children have active continuations; root CLI authority still routes stable report/default fields toward existing command-generation guard work.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: promote the next #450 child after external issue evidence refresh

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Merge setup findings, dogfooding feedback, and review promotion into improvement intake.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Preserve evidence provenance and keep review machinery advanced/opt-in.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Which existing report/default/docs surfaces are enough to expose the unified route.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The work would require a new command or hide evidence confidence.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Merge related routing concepts instead of adding capability or new surfaces.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this reduce cognitive load for product/workflow improvement signals while preserving trust and provenance?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Add a compact improvement-intake payload to existing defaults/report routing, then update tests and docs.
invariants: Improvement intake is a router, not a backlog.
Weak or speculative signals remain dismissible.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/workspace-improvement-intake.plan.json src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/contracts tests/test_workspace_cli.py docs .agentic-workspace/docs --format json
uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
completion_criteria: Agents have one conceptual path for routing product/workflow improvement signals.
Evidence source and confidence remain explicit.
Weak/speculative signals are easier to dismiss than promote.
Docs stop presenting setup findings, dogfooding feedback, and review promotion as unrelated mechanisms.

execution_run.what happened: Added the improvement_intake router to defaults and report output, connected setup_findings_promotion to it, preserved review_artifacts as advanced opt-in, and updated docs/tests around the shared intake model.
execution_run.scope touched: .agentic-workspace/planning state and review docs, report contracts, src/agentic_workspace/cli.py, tests/test_workspace_cli.py, docs/contributor-playbook.md, docs/dogfooding-feedback.md
execution_run.changed surfaces: Existing defaults/report/docs/test/planning surfaces were updated; no new top-level command or first-contact file was added.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed ... --format json; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: This slice is ready to archive and #457 can close; parent #450 remains open.
execution_run.next step: Refresh external issue evidence and promote the next #450 child.
